mapper.insert:
insert into order_items (order_id, product_variant_id, product_name, sku, price, quantity, total_price, created_at, updated_at) values
( #{item.orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productVariantId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sku, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.totalPrice, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
